meta.title: Ciprnode - Cosmic Index of Public Resources
meta.description: A decentralized search index for public resources.

search.title: Cosmic Index of Public Resources
search.operators_tooltip:
Supported operators:

<word> AND <word>
<word> OR <word>
<word> NOT <word>
<word>*
^<word>
"<word> <word>"
NEAR(<word>, <word>, ...)
<col name> : <word>
{<col name> <col name> ...} : <word>
(<grouping of any of the above>)

info.seeking: Search prioritizing resources that offer what your search terms specify
info.offering: Search prioritizing resources that require what your search terms specify

results.heading: Results ({start}-{end})
results.explore_heading: A random selection of entries to explore the Cipr

footer.install_ios: To install Cipr on your device, tap the Share icon at the bottom of your screen and select 'Add to Home Screen'.
footer.install_fallback: To install Cipr, please look for the 'Install' or 'Add to Home Screen' option in your browser menu.
footer.label: Footer links

error.noscript: Using ECMAScript/JavaScript is not optional here because this is a simple client for a diverse network of resources. Without scripting, fetching is not possible. For instance, this tool becomes useless in those conditions.

pwa.update_available: A new version of this page is available.
